title: Lever state file
description: Per-lever machine state, written by the lever-* skills. One file per lever directory: .agents/levers/<id>-<slug>/lever.yaml.

lever_id.description: Unique sequential lever identifier (the leading <id> in the directory name).

slug.description: Lower snake_case slug; matches the trailing <slug> in the directory name.

created_at.description: Set by /lever-new at lever-dir creation; immutable.

step.description: Single state pointer. /lever <id> reads this, runs the matching procedure for `plan|do|check|act`, advances on success. `done` is terminal success; `cancel` is terminal abandonment. The pair (step, pause) is the full state. /lever-new seeds at `plan` (the brief is captured pre-state, before lever.yaml exists).

pause.description: Optional pause reason — present iff the chain is halted at `step` waiting for the user. `ask` = open question or fork (info missing or option to pick). `blocked` = external blocker (auth, env, budget exhausted). Absent when running or terminal. Re-invoking /lever <id> after the user resolves it re-enters the same step.

criteria.description: Empty after /lever-new; populated by /lever <id> at the plan step; flags flipped by do and check.

decisions.description: Non-obvious calls do made; one bullet per decision. Sole record — LEVER.md does not mirror this.

hints.description: Promotable moments check surfaced; one bullet per hint, no proposal. Sole record — LEVER.md does not mirror this. Input to act.

budget.description: Set by the plan step; immutable thereafter unless /lever <id> re-enters plan.

id.description: Stable, monotonically increasing (C1, C2, ...). Never reused; never reordered.

seed.description: Optional first-failing-test pointer for an obvious TDD starter.

passes.description: Latest verifier result. False at plan time; flipped by do; overwritten by check on rerun.

output.description: Latest verifier output, one trimmed line. Prefer the verifier's own summary when it produces one (e.g. '1 passed', '2 matches'); fall back to 'exit 0' or the first failing line when the command is silent.

events.description: Per-criterion event log written by do (and re-run by check). Capped at the last 10 rows per criterion; on overflow, the oldest rows are replaced with a single `verb: fold` row whose `at` is the time range and `note` explains how many rows were dropped. /lever-status <id> renders this as a per-criterion timeline when the user asks for the trace.

at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp, or HH:MM-HH:MM range for fold compactions.

verb.description: Per-criterion verb. `pass` / `fail` record a verifier run; `fold` marks a compaction row written when the cap evicts older rows. Lever-wide non-obvious calls go in top-level `decisions[]`, not in events.

cmd.description: Exact shell command run, when applicable.

note.description: One-line decision rationale or fold root-cause / drop count.

cmd.description: Passes when cmd exits 0. Default for code-level checks (tests, type-checks, behavioral verifiers).

screenshot.description: Path to the screenshot do attaches.

expects.description: One-line rubric: what the screenshot must show to pass.

instructions.description: Multi-line instructions do runs step-by-step. Manual verifiers always require explicit user confirmation; check gates on the user-confirmation event recorded in lever.yaml.criteria[i].events.
